data.title: Pump.fun proposes to endorse an official Elon Musk token

data.title: Tesla's stock price plummeted 17%, and its market value evaporated by $100 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market news shows that Tesla (TSLA) stock price fell sharply today, with the intraday decline widening to 17%, and its market value shrinking by about US$100 billion.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: We may see a "crypto IPO frenzy"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arthur Hayes posted on social media today that the market has completed a "cycle" and the spirit of ICO in 2017 has now transformed into the crypto IPO boom of 2025-2027. "This is the beginning of a frenzy that will end with an IPO like EOS that attracts huge amounts of fiat currency and plummets at the opening."

data.title: Plume Network Launches EVM-Compatible Layer 2 to Advance RWA Tokenization
data.description:
TL;DR Plume Network launched its mainnet with $150M in tokenized assets, backed by Apollo Global and Haun Ventures. During its testnet, it processed 280 million transactions in eight weeks, signaling strong demand for RWAs. It closed a deal with Mercado Bitcoin to tokenize $40M in Brazil and plans to scale its onchain offering this year. . . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/plume-network-launches-evm-compatible-layer-2-to-advance-rwa-tokenization/

data.title: What’s Next for AI and Web3: NeuroSymbolic Intelligence
data.description:
As artificial intelligence (AI) powers ahead, the question is no longer if we will integrate AI into core Web3 protocols and applications, but how. Behind the scenes, the rise of NeuroSymbolic AI promises to be useful in addressing the risks inherent with today’s large language models (LLMs).Unlike LLMs that rely solely on neural architectures, NeuroSymbolic AI combines neural methods with symbolic reasoning. The neural component handles perception, learning, and discovery; the symbolic layer adds structured logic, rule-following, and abstraction
source: https://www.coindesk.com/opinion/2025/06/05/whats-next-for-ai-and-web3-neurosymbolic-intelligence

data.title: Major stocks tank against Circle's spectacular NYSE debut
data.description:
The Circle stock opens more than 124% higher than its IPO price but other crypto stocks dip.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/major-stocks-tank-against-circles-spectacular-nyse-debut

data.title: California Crypto Bill Rockets Forward, Promising New Protections for Dormant Assets
data.description:
California crypto bill AB 1052 has secured Assembly approval, proposing that dormant custodial assets stay in native form with a state-licensed custodian after three years of inactivity. Self-hosted wallets are excluded, and any user activity resets the countdown as the bill advances to the Senate.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/california-crypto-bill-advances-safeguarding-dormant-assets/
